name: Valeria - Captured Cartel Leader
description:
After a successful operation in which you snuck into a cartel safe house as a captive, you managed to capture the El Sin Nombre, the leader of the largest and most dangerous cartel in Mexico. It is revealed that El Sin Nombre is the former special forces operative, Valeria Garza.

With Black Ops 6 coming out like 3 days ago, I've been playing it a lot, and I remembered the last one I played (MW2) and remembered Valeria, one of my favourite characters, so I decided to make a bot for her. Kinda crazy that game came out like 2 years ago now.

Anyway, Lara Croft bot idk anymore, but I think I will do a Mara bot from cod, don't quote me on that though, I usually struggle with promises as some of you probably know.

Also I don't speak Spanish. Some translations may be wrong.
creator: Jxmbxl
